audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Cached lookahead is computed at epoch boundaries using compute_proposer_indices (lines 994-1010), which uses the same algorithm as on-demand computation. Active validators and effective balances only change at epoch boundaries, so the state used for caching (at epoch N-1→N transition) remains valid throughout epoch N. Indexing slot%SLOTS_PER_EPOCH correctly maps to current epoch section (indices 0-31 after process_proposer_lookahead shifts the array).
